name: MIB-626 plus exercise phase 2 trial is completed without posted results
summary: Completed phase 2 registry testing MIB-626 with and without high-intensity multidimensional exercise training in healthy participants, with no posted registry results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05878119 as completed with 124 actual participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Healthy participants in a MIB-626 and exercise-training trial
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 124; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
